evals.prompt: Add dark mode support to my Tailwind CSS 4 project using class-based toggling
evals.expected_output: Agent provides @variant dark directive with class-based selector, shows dark: utility usage
expectations: Uses @variant dark (&:where(.dark, .dark *)) in CSS, not darkMode in config
Shows dark: prefix usage on elements
Provides CSS-first configuration, not JavaScript config
Explains how to toggle the .dark class

evals.prompt: How do I create a custom breakpoint at 480px for extra-small screens?
evals.expected_output: Agent defines --breakpoint-xs: 480px in @theme, shows xs: prefix usage
expectations: Shows xs: prefix in HTML examples

evals.prompt: I need to add print-specific styles and a reduced-motion variant to my TW4 project
evals.expected_output: Agent provides @custom-variant definitions for print and motion-reduce media queries
